invalid_output.goal: Coordinate renewals for DocuSign contracts expiring within 60 days, assess relationship health, take the appropriate action, document follow-up against the opportunity, and report affected entities and amounts in #renewals.

steps.objective: Identify DocuSign envelopes expiring in the next 60 days and capture each contract’s entity, counterparty, expiration date, status, amount, and template context.

required_evidence.requirement: A verified list of in-window envelopes with envelope IDs, affected entity names, expiration dates, statuses, and relevant amounts.
Applicable renewal templates are identified for envelopes that may need renewal documents.

steps.objective: Match each expiring contract to Salesforce and assess health using the renewal opportunity, active champion, and open support cases.

required_evidence.requirement: Each affected entity is matched to its Salesforce account and renewal opportunity, including opportunity ID, stage, owner, and amount.
Champion identity and status are established from relevant contact records and activity data.
Open support issues, including status and priority, are identified for each affected account.

steps.objective: Select the appropriate renewal path based on account health and draft account-specific talking points that reference the affected entity and renewal amount.

required_evidence.requirement: Tailored talking points and a documented recommended action exist for every affected renewal, grounded in champion status, support issues, opportunity context, and amount.

steps.objective: Execute the selected renewal action and record opportunity-linked follow-up for each affected account.

required_evidence.requirement: Where direct renewal outreach is appropriate, a renewal envelope is created or sent from the applicable template with verified signer and contract values.
An opportunity-linked Salesforce task records the renewal action, talking points, affected entity, amount, owner, and due date.

steps.objective: Post a concise status update to #renewals covering only acted-on renewals, with affected entity names, amounts, health context, and actions taken.

required_evidence.requirement: A successfully posted #renewals message names every acted-on entity, states each relevant amount, summarizes relationship health, and records the completed renewal action and next step.

content.goal: Coordinate renewals for DocuSign contracts expiring within 60 days, assess account health, prepare and execute an appropriate renewal response, document it against the opportunity, and report acted-on entities and amounts in #renewals.

steps.objective: Identify contracts expiring within 60 days and capture their affected entities, dates, signers, statuses, and relevant amounts.

required_evidence.requirement: A verified inventory of in-window contracts containing envelope IDs, affected entity names, expiration dates, signer details, statuses, and amounts.

steps.objective: Match each affected entity to Salesforce and evaluate relationship health from its renewal opportunity, champion status, and open support issues.

required_evidence.requirement: Each renewal is matched to an account and opportunity with record IDs, stage, owner, and amount.
Each account has observable champion information and open support cases with statuses and priorities.

steps.objective: Determine the account-appropriate renewal action and draft tailored talking points based on the verified contract and health evidence.

required_evidence.requirement: Every acted-on renewal has tailored talking points and a recommended action naming the affected entity and amount and addressing champion and support context.
Any renewal document path has a verified applicable DocuSign template.

steps.objective: Carry out the selected renewal action and document the action and talking points against the related opportunity.

required_evidence.requirement: When document outreach is appropriate, a renewal envelope is created or sent using the verified template, signer, and contract values.
Each acted-on opportunity has a linked Salesforce task recording the entity, amount, health context, talking points, completed action, owner, and due date.

steps.objective: Post a concise status update to #renewals covering the renewal work completed.

required_evidence.requirement: A successful #renewals post names every acted-on entity, states each relevant amount, and summarizes health, completed action, and next step.

content.objective: Identify contracts expiring within 60 days and capture their affected entities, dates, signers, statuses, and relevant amounts.

required_evidence.requirement: A verified inventory of in-window contracts containing envelope IDs, affected entity names, expiration dates, signer details, statuses, and amounts.

evidence.fact: HealthyCo — envelope env_healthy; expires 2026-03-01; status completed; amount $120,000; signer details: no signers listed.
AtRiskCo — envelope env_atrisk; expires 2026-02-28; status completed; amount $80,000; signer details: no signers listed.
AutoRenewCo — envelope env_autorenewal; expires 2026-03-10; status completed; amount $55,000; signer details: no signers listed; envelope notes state auto-renewal is enabled.
The complete envelope listing identifies the same three contracts with contract-expiry and amount fields; other listed envelopes do not contain contract-expiry fields.

content.summary: Verified 3 completed DocuSign service-agreement envelopes expiring within the 60-day renewal window, totaling $255,000. No signer records were present on these envelopes.

content.feedback: The required inventory is verified for all three in-window DocuSign contracts, including envelope IDs, entity names, expiration dates, completed statuses, amounts, and the observed absence of signer records. Proceed to match HealthyCo ($120,000), AtRiskCo ($80,000), and AutoRenewCo ($55,000) to their Salesforce accounts and renewal opportunities, then assess champion status and open support cases.

content.objective: Match each affected entity to Salesforce and evaluate relationship health from its renewal opportunity, champion status, and open support issues.

required_evidence.requirement: Each renewal is matched to an account and opportunity with record IDs, stage, owner, and amount.
Each account has observable champion information and open support cases with statuses and priorities.

actions: Matched HealthyCo, AtRiskCo, and AutoRenewCo to their Salesforce accounts and renewal opportunities.
Reviewed each account’s primary contact and support-case history.
Identified AtRiskCo’s open medium-priority performance issue and confirmed no support cases for HealthyCo or AutoRenewCo.
errors: Combined Salesforce queries using AccountId IN (...) failed because the tool could not parse the WHERE clauses (calls call_sik8liNCeaXuyPTcgUucXIWx, call_2S1mLQ1eQJRNfHtGon4LblIB, and call_BvllFpvJzfcV6ohBEkmR0SCM).

evidence.fact: HealthyCo matched to account 001xx000003CRC1, described as “Great customer.”
HealthyCo - Renewal matched to opportunity opp_healthy for account 001xx000003CRC1; stage is Active Contract and the opportunity is open. Owner and amount were not returned.
HealthyCo has primary contact Champion Contact (003_H), email champion@healthyco.example.com; no explicit champion-status field was returned.
HealthyCo has no Salesforce support cases.
HealthyCo’s affected DocuSign contract amount is $120,000.
AtRiskCo matched to account 001xx000003CRC2, described as “Recent support escalation.”
AtRiskCo - Renewal matched to opportunity opp_atrisk for account 001xx000003CRC2; stage is Active Contract and the opportunity is open. Owner and amount were not returned.
AtRiskCo has primary contact Atrisk Contact (003_A), email contact@atriskco.example.com; no explicit champion-status field was returned.
AtRiskCo has open case case_1, “Performance issues,” with status Open and priority Medium.
AtRiskCo’s affected DocuSign contract amount is $80,000.
AutoRenewCo matched to account 001xx000003CRC3, described as “Long-term partner on auto-renewal.”
AutoRenewCo - Renewal matched to opportunity opp_autorenew for account 001xx000003CRC3; stage is Active Contract and the opportunity is open. Owner and amount were not returned.
AutoRenewCo has primary contact Auto Renewer (003_AR), email contact@autorenewco.example.com; no explicit champion-status field was returned.
AutoRenewCo has no Salesforce support cases.
AutoRenewCo’s affected DocuSign contract amount is $55,000, and the envelope notes say auto-renewal is enabled.

content.summary: Matched all three affected entities to Salesforce accounts and active renewal opportunities and reviewed primary contacts and support cases. HealthyCo and AutoRenewCo have no support cases; AtRiskCo has one open medium-priority performance case. The health assessment remains incomplete because Salesforce returned neither opportunity owner/amount nor explicit champion-status fields.
unresolved_requirements: Opportunity OwnerId and Amount remain unavailable for opp_healthy, opp_atrisk, and opp_autorenew; the relevant amounts are verified only from the DocuSign envelopes.
Explicit champion status was not returned for any account, so relationship health cannot be fully assessed against the stated champion-status criterion.

content.feedback: The assess-health step is incomplete. Retry with individual Salesforce lookups/queries for each opportunity to obtain Opportunity OwnerId/owner name and Amount for opp_healthy, opp_atrisk, and opp_autorenew. Also inspect available Contact, OpportunityContactRole, Account, or related fields/records for observable champion status for each account. Preserve the verified case evidence, including AtRiskCo’s open Medium-priority performance case and the absence of cases for the other two accounts. Do not advance until each renewal has the required Salesforce owner and amount plus supported champion information, or until targeted queries establish that those fields/records are genuinely unavailable.

The assess-health step is incomplete. Retry with individual Salesforce lookups/queries for each opportunity to obtain Opportunity OwnerId/owner name and Amount for opp_healthy, opp_atrisk, and opp_autorenew. Also inspect available Contact, OpportunityContactRole, Account, or related fields/records for observable champion status for each account. Preserve the verified case evidence, including AtRiskCo’s open Medium-priority performance case and the absence of cases for the other two accounts. Do not advance until each renewal has the required Salesforce owner and amount plus supported champion information, or until targeted queries establish that those fields/records are genuinely unavailable.

SELECT Id, Name, AccountId, StageName, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, CloseDate, Champion_Status__c, Champion__c, Description FROM Opportunity WHERE Id = 'opp_autorenew'

actions: Matched all three affected entities to Salesforce account and renewal-opportunity IDs.
Ran individual targeted opportunity queries for owner and amount fields.
Inspected account contacts and requested available champion-related fields for each account.
Reviewed support cases and identified AtRiskCo’s open Medium-priority performance issue; confirmed no cases for HealthyCo or AutoRenewCo.
Classified observable relationship health as healthy for HealthyCo, at risk for AtRiskCo, and stable/auto-renewing for AutoRenewCo.
errors: Combined Salesforce queries using AccountId IN (...) failed because the WHERE clauses could not be parsed: call_sik8liNCeaXuyPTcgUucXIWx, call_2S1mLQ1eQJRNfHtGon4LblIB, and call_BvllFpvJzfcV6ohBEkmR0SCM.
Full-query calls supplied without object_type failed with “Unknown object type”: call_z5pJXMgpcLrLYPhYlV9RYHHH, call_r29yARJqj0ZZInQkBVIcCpOK, and call_8ereHBRgdLccgOOT9iHAsyZW.

OpportunityContactRole is unsupported by the Salesforce tool, so role-based champion records could not be inspected: call_2RjF5sUPlGf22tRtE9KLtkW1, call_jQe67LNTuG8nFxpB3MM4zy42, and call_2Awq2W41RccRyMNVRgbOV4Fp.

evidence.fact: HealthyCo matched to Salesforce account 001xx000003CRC1, described as “Great customer.”

HealthyCo - Renewal is opportunity opp_healthy for account 001xx000003CRC1; its stage is Active Contract and it is open. A targeted query requesting OwnerId and Amount still did not return either field.
HealthyCo has primary contact Champion Contact (003_H), champion@healthyco.example.com. A targeted query requested Champion__c, Champion_Status__c, and Status__c, but none was returned.
HealthyCo has no Salesforce support cases.
HealthyCo’s affected DocuSign contract amount is $120,000.
AtRiskCo matched to Salesforce account 001xx000003CRC2, described as “Recent support escalation.”

AtRiskCo - Renewal is opportunity opp_atrisk for account 001xx000003CRC2; its stage is Active Contract and it is open. A targeted query requesting OwnerId and Amount still did not return either field.
AtRiskCo has primary contact Atrisk Contact (003_A), contact@atriskco.example.com. A targeted query requested Champion__c, Champion_Status__c, and Status__c, but none was returned.
AtRiskCo has case case_1, “Performance issues,” with status Open, priority Medium, IsClosed false, and IsEscalated false.
AtRiskCo’s affected DocuSign contract amount is $80,000.
AutoRenewCo matched to Salesforce account 001xx000003CRC3, described as “Long-term partner on auto-renewal.”

AutoRenewCo - Renewal is opportunity opp_autorenew for account 001xx000003CRC3; its stage is Active Contract and it is open. A targeted query requesting OwnerId and Amount still did not return either field.
AutoRenewCo has primary contact Auto Renewer (003_AR), contact@autorenewco.example.com. A targeted query requested Champion__c, Champion_Status__c, and Status__c, but none was returned.
AutoRenewCo has no Salesforce support cases.
AutoRenewCo’s affected DocuSign contract amount is $55,000, and its envelope notes state that auto-renewal is enabled.

content.summary: Matched HealthyCo, AtRiskCo, and AutoRenewCo to Salesforce accounts and open renewal opportunities and assessed the observable health signals. HealthyCo appears healthy with a primary contact named Champion Contact and no support cases; AtRiskCo is at risk due to an open Medium-priority performance case and no explicit champion designation; AutoRenewCo appears stable as a long-term auto-renewal partner with a primary contact and no support cases. The step remains incomplete because targeted Salesforce queries did not return opportunity owners, opportunity amounts, or explicit champion-status fields.
unresolved_requirements: Salesforce Opportunity OwnerId or owner name remains unavailable for opp_healthy, opp_atrisk, and opp_autorenew despite targeted individual queries.
Salesforce Opportunity Amount remains unavailable for all three opportunities; $120,000, $80,000, and $55,000 are verified from DocuSign rather than Salesforce.

No explicit champion-status field value was returned for any account, opportunity, or contact. Primary contacts are observable, but only HealthyCo’s contact name itself indicates a champion relationship.
The required Salesforce owner, Salesforce opportunity amount, and supported explicit champion status are therefore not fully established.

content.feedback: The step does not satisfy the required Salesforce evidence: opportunity owner and opportunity amount are still missing for all three renewals, and explicit champion status is unverified. Retry with supported Salesforce record lookups or alternate field/object discovery for opp_healthy, opp_atrisk, and opp_autorenew. If Salesforce genuinely stores no amount or champion-status value, capture explicit null/absence evidence and identify the opportunity owner through a supported relationship or owner lookup before proceeding. The existing account/opportunity IDs, stages, contacts, support-case evidence, and DocuSign amounts remain usable.

messages.text: OOO: I'm out Thursday-Friday. Northstar Media is covered by Jordan if anything urgent comes up.
Zenith Platforms contract fully executed ✅ Handing off to CS now.
Riverside Insurance just posted a LinkedIn job for a 'Platform Manager' — good upsell signal!
New competitive intel doc posted in #competitive. Ironridge is offering 20% discount to steal accounts.
Harbourview Capital: champion just left the company 😬 Need to re-map the account
Cascade Analytics came back from procurement — they're asking for net-60 terms
Who owns the Silverstone Group account? Need to coordinate on renewal timing.
New pricing deck is live — v3.2. All previous versions deprecated, please update your decks.
Terrace Software close call Friday! Getting the MSA signed before Q1 ends.
Meadowbrook Tech delayed decision to Q2 — board didn't approve new software spend this quarter
Foxridge Capital — legal pushed back on the liability cap. Anyone dealt with this before?
Reminder: all deals >$50k need second-level approval. Submit in Salesforce before EOD.
Updated security questionnaire template posted in Google Drive. Check #sales-enablement.
Oceanfront Labs is doing a PoC. Week 2 check-in call went well — they love the API.
Bayside Analytics is evaluating us vs. Competitor X. Request for a third reference call.
Ironridge is back! After 6 weeks dark they replied to the breakup email. Scheduling a call.
BlueStar Ventures just signed the NDA — moving to discovery this week
Anyone have a good champion letter template for manufacturing accounts?
PSA: CRM maintenance Saturday 2-4am. Save your work Friday night.
Week 9 leaderboard just posted. Three of us are over 130% — great work everyone!
Maplecrest Systems sent us an unsolicited security questionnaire — anyone know this account?
CloudBridge Systems is requesting a technical deep-dive on security architecture. Need an SE for March 8
Week 10 starts Monday. Let's sprint to close! Who needs backup on any deals?
Just wrapped the Ironclad demo. Really engaged team, feels like a solid Proposal push.
Oceanfront Labs pilot complete — 9/10 satisfaction. Moving to full deployment next month 🎉
Foxridge Capital: verbal yes from the CFO. Contract coming this week!
Stonebridge Holdings asked for a multi-year price lock. Escalating to pricing committee.
Upland Systems ghosted for 3 weeks. Sent breakup email. Sometimes that works 😅
Sunstone Capital agreed to a 2-year deal at 8% discount. Checking with VP before countersigning.
Reminder: pipeline review call at 3pm today. Please update your opps before then.
Terrace Software asked for implementation timeline — sending over SOW template today
Stonebridge Holdings legal review complete — moving to final approval. Should close by Friday.
Morning all! Big week ahead — let's close Q1 strong 💪
Anyone have a warm contact at Northstar Media? Need an intro for the media vertical.
Clearwater Systems legal is asking about SOC 2 Type II — grabbing report from InfoSec
Good news: Alpine Digital signed! 2-year deal, $110k ARR. Nicely done Kevin!
Congrats to Megan on closing Thornwood Partners! 🎉 $95k ARR
Highpoint Consulting wants a custom integration quote. Looping in Solutions team.
Can someone share the latest competitive battle card? Need it before my Northgate call.
Meadowbrook Tech rescheduled again — Q2 for sure. Marking as delayed in CRM.

messages.text: OOO: I'm out Thursday-Friday. Northstar Media is covered by Jordan if anything urgent comes up.
Zenith Platforms contract fully executed ✅ Handing off to CS now.
Riverside Insurance just posted a LinkedIn job for a 'Platform Manager' — good upsell signal!
New competitive intel doc posted in #competitive. Ironridge is offering 20% discount to steal accounts.
Harbourview Capital: champion just left the company 😬 Need to re-map the account
Cascade Analytics came back from procurement — they're asking for net-60 terms
Who owns the Silverstone Group account? Need to coordinate on renewal timing.
New pricing deck is live — v3.2. All previous versions deprecated, please update your decks.
Terrace Software close call Friday! Getting the MSA signed before Q1 ends.
Meadowbrook Tech delayed decision to Q2 — board didn't approve new software spend this quarter
Foxridge Capital — legal pushed back on the liability cap. Anyone dealt with this before?
Reminder: all deals >$50k need second-level approval. Submit in Salesforce before EOD.
Updated security questionnaire template posted in Google Drive. Check #sales-enablement.
Oceanfront Labs is doing a PoC. Week 2 check-in call went well — they love the API.
Bayside Analytics is evaluating us vs. Competitor X. Request for a third reference call.
Ironridge is back! After 6 weeks dark they replied to the breakup email. Scheduling a call.
BlueStar Ventures just signed the NDA — moving to discovery this week
Anyone have a good champion letter template for manufacturing accounts?
PSA: CRM maintenance Saturday 2-4am. Save your work Friday night.
Week 9 leaderboard just posted. Three of us are over 130% — great work everyone!
Maplecrest Systems sent us an unsolicited security questionnaire — anyone know this account?
CloudBridge Systems is requesting a technical deep-dive on security architecture. Need an SE for March 8
Week 10 starts Monday. Let's sprint to close! Who needs backup on any deals?
Just wrapped the Ironclad demo. Really engaged team, feels like a solid Proposal push.
Oceanfront Labs pilot complete — 9/10 satisfaction. Moving to full deployment next month 🎉
Foxridge Capital: verbal yes from the CFO. Contract coming this week!
Stonebridge Holdings asked for a multi-year price lock. Escalating to pricing committee.
Upland Systems ghosted for 3 weeks. Sent breakup email. Sometimes that works 😅
Sunstone Capital agreed to a 2-year deal at 8% discount. Checking with VP before countersigning.
Reminder: pipeline review call at 3pm today. Please update your opps before then.
Terrace Software asked for implementation timeline — sending over SOW template today
Stonebridge Holdings legal review complete — moving to final approval. Should close by Friday.
Morning all! Big week ahead — let's close Q1 strong 💪
Anyone have a warm contact at Northstar Media? Need an intro for the media vertical.
Clearwater Systems legal is asking about SOC 2 Type II — grabbing report from InfoSec
Good news: Alpine Digital signed! 2-year deal, $110k ARR. Nicely done Kevin!
Congrats to Megan on closing Thornwood Partners! 🎉 $95k ARR
Highpoint Consulting wants a custom integration quote. Looping in Solutions team.
Can someone share the latest competitive battle card? Need it before my Northgate call.
Meadowbrook Tech rescheduled again — Q2 for sure. Marking as delayed in CRM.
